Name: FMovieSceneEvaluationKey
Description: Keyable struct that represents a particular entity within an evaluation template (either a sectiontemplate or a track)

Variables.Name: SequenceID
Variables.Description: ID of the sequence that the entity is contained within

Variables.Name: TrackIdentifier
Variables.Description: ID of the track this key relates to

Variables.Name: SectionIdentifier
Variables.Description: ID of the section this key relates to (or -1 where this key relates to a track)
